description: Defines the CustomerPortalScreen widget, including sub-widgets to display customer outage status, account details, and tips, using Flutter UI components.

classes.name: CustomerPortalScreen
classes.description: Main widget displaying customer outage and account status, and tips.

classes.name: _StatusCard
classes.description: Widget displaying outage details including location, status, ETA, affected customers, and notes.

classes.name: _Pill
classes.description: UI element representing a status or info badge with an icon and text.

classes.name: _EmptyState
classes.description: Widget shown when there are no active outages.

classes.name: _TipsCard
classes.description: Card displaying safety tips for customers.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Build method for CustomerPortalScreen, assembling the UI based on outage status.

methods.name: _AccountCard.build
methods.description: Build widget displaying account ID info.

methods.name: _Pill.build
methods.description: Create a stylized badge with icon and label.

methods.name: _EmptyState.build
methods.description: Create UI for no active outages.
